parental rights

proposals.evidence: ¶6: The phrase 'juvenile court may' is misplaced after 'parental rights'. The PDF source shows correct text split across lines: 'parental rights' then (with line break) 'proceedings.' The DB has incorrectly concatenated these, inserting 'juvenile court may' in between.

a juvenile court may
terminate parental rights
proposals.evidence: ¶6: Missing words 'juvenile court may' after the article 'a'. The erroneous phrase 'a terminate parental rights' should be 'a juvenile court may terminate parental rights'. The missing text was displaced earlier in the same sentence (see first proposal).

coverage_note: Full text scan from header through signature block (¶1–¶19). All citations verified against authoritative PDF. Paragraph-by-paragraph comparison revealed two substantive split_join errors in ¶6; all other paragraph-level differences are formatting (line breaks) from PDF layout, not text errors."
